style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;gradientColor=#b3b3b3;" value="<p data-start="907" data-end="934"><b><span data-start="907" data-end="934"><font style="font-size: 15px;">ACE Recognition Pattern</font></span></b></p><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 13px;">✓ Users connect to the nearest Edge PoP</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 13px;">✓ Traffic traverses Google's private global network</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 13px;">✓ Regions contain multiple zones</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 13px;">✓ Zones provide fault tolerance</font></div><div align="left"><font style="font-size: 13px;">✓ Applications can span zones for high availability</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="154" width="344" x="45" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-19" parent="1" data-end="1298"><font style="font-size: 15px;">Global Infrastructure Features</font></strong></p><div align="left"><div><ul data-start="1300" data-end="1430"><li data-start="1300" data-end="1321"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Low latency routing<br></font></li><li data-start="1322" data-end="1346"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Private fiber backbone<br></font></li><li data-start="1347" data-end="1365"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Multiple regions<br></font></li><li data-start="1366" data-end="1389"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Multi-zone redundancy<br></font></li><li data-start="1390" data-end="1409"><font style="font-size: 14px;">High availability<br></font></li><li data-start="1410" data-end="1430"><font style="font-size: 14px;">Global scalability</font></li></ul></div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="146" width="233" x="100.5" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-20" parent="1" (PoP)</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="368" x="415.5" y="261" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-22" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#663300);gradientColor=light-dark(#000000,#FF8000);" value="<b><font style="font-size: 19px;">Google Cloud Region</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="368" x="414" y="431" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-23" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=light-dark(#FFFFFF,#006600);gradientColor=light-dark(#000000,#00FF00);" value="<b><font style="font-size: 19px;">Users</font></b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="368" x="415.5" y="171" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-24" edge="1" parent="1" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="50" y="648" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Ch8XMgaBBbLGXFm_0eq8-25" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div align="left"><font style="font-size: 14px;">&nbsp; &nbsp; User requests enter Google's nearest Edge Point of Presence, traverse Google's private global fiber backbone, arrive at the selected region, and are served by resources running across multiple zones for high availability and resilience.</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="63" width="726" x="74" y="649" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
